MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-10-24 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 304

ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION 304, NO APPEARANCES, NOT CONTESTED, AND THE TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER'S MOTION TO REALIGN DEFENDANT-HEIR AS PLAINTIFF AND TO SUBSTITUTE SUCCESSOR-IN- INTEREST FOR DECEASED PLAINTIFF IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO C.C.P SECTIONS 382, 377.20 AND 377.31. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORLANDO MOORE IS HEREBY REALIGNED AS PLAINTIFF, AND IT IS FURTHER ORDERED THAT HE IS TO BE SUBSTITUTED INTO THE ACTION AS SUCCESSOR-IN-INTEREST TO DECEDENT DEBRA HOPSON. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN. CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA. NOT REPORTED. (304/EPS)

Off Calendar Feb-20-2025 Continued To Apr-17-25 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 304

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Realign Defendant-Heir As Plaintiff And To Substitute Successor In Interest For Deceased Plaintiff
Off Calendar Dec-10-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. This matter is not contested. The tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

Petitioner's Motion to Realign Defendant-Heir as Plaintiff and to Substitute Successor-in- Interest for Deceased Plaintiff is GRANTED pursuant to C.C.P sections 382, 377.20 and 377.31. No opposition filed. Orlando Moore is hereby realigned as Plaintiff, and it is further ordered that he is to be substituted into the action as Successor-in-Interest to Decedent Debra Hopson.

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Not Reported. (304/EPS)
